title: PAI: The Life OS for AI-Powered Development
summary: PAI (Personal AI Infrastructure) is a Life OS built on Claude Code that provides AI agents with persistent memory, custom skills, structured workflows, and a local dashboard. It addresses the problem of AI forgetting project context, architecture, and coding standards across sessions by implementing a seven-phase algorithm for observation, planning, building, execution, verification, and learning.
writeup: The video covers PAI (Personal AI Infrastructure), a Life OS built on Claude Code that gives AI agents persistent memory, custom skills, structured workflows, and a local dashboard. It targets a recurring failure mode: AI losing project context, architecture, and coding standards between sessions. The proposed fix is a seven-phase algorithm spanning observation, planning, building, execution, verification, and learning, so context and standards persist across sessions rather than resetting each time.
